# 📋 Quick Reference Card

Print this page or save as PDF for quick access!

---

## 👤 FOR USERS

### **How to Submit Forecast (3 Steps)**

1. **Open** → Forecast sheet
2. **Fill** → Columns B-P (leave A empty)
3. **Done** → System auto-generates ID

### **Required Columns**

| Column | What to Enter |
|--------|---------------|
| B | Quarter (Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4) |
| C | Year (FY25) |
| J | Category (1 of 12) |
| P | Forecast Amount |

**⚠️ Don't touch Column A** - Auto-generated!

### **How to Log PR**

1. **Open** → PR Tracking sheet
2. **Enter** → Forecast ID + PR details
3. **Done** → System matches automatically

### **Reminder Schedule**

- 🟡 **5 days** before deadline
- 🟠 **1 day** before deadline  
- 🔴 **7am** on deadline day

---

## 👨‍💼 FOR ADMINS

### **Daily Tasks (5 min)**

```
☐ Check User Status sheet
☐ Run: Generate Forecast IDs
☐ Monitor reminders
```

### **Weekly Tasks (15 min)**

```
☐ Update Config (Period, Deadline)
☐ Send manual reminders if needed
☐ Review submission progress
```

### **Monthly Tasks (30 min)**

```
☐ Generate Variance Report
☐ Share with management
☐ Archive old period
☐ Update user list
```

### **Quick Menu Guide**

| Menu Item | When to Use |
|-----------|-------------|
| 🎯 Generate Forecast IDs | Daily after submissions |
| 🔄 Sync Forecast vs Actual | Before reports |
| 📧 Send Reminders Now | Manual nudge |
| 👥 Update User Submission Status | Check progress |
| 📊 Generate Variance Report | After deadline |

---

## 🔧 QUICK FIXES

### **Problem: No Forecast ID**
✅ Fill Quarter & Year → Run Generate IDs

### **Problem: PR not matching**
✅ Check Forecast ID exactly matches → Re-sync

### **Problem: Not receiving emails**
✅ Check spam → Verify email in Config

### **Problem: Can't edit sheet**
✅ Contact admin for permissions

---

## 📊 SHEET STRUCTURE

```
Forecast Sheet:
A=ID (AUTO) | B=Quarter | C=Year | ... | P=Amount | Q=User (AUTO)

PR Tracking:
A=Forecast ID | B=PR# | C=Date | D=Amount | ...

Config Sheet:
Current Period | Deadline | User Emails
```

## 🗓️ FORECAST CALENDAR

| Period | Deadline | Type |
|--------|----------|------|
| Q1M1 | Mid-Oct | Forecast |
| Q1M3 | Mid-Dec | Confirm |
| Q2M1 | Mid-Jan | Forecast |
| Q2M3 | Mid-Mar | Confirm + Extended |
| Q3M1 | Mid-Apr | Forecast + Extended |
| Q3M3 | Mid-Jun | Confirm + Extended |
| Q4M1 | Mid-Jul | Forecast |
| Q4M3 | Mid-Sep | Confirm |

## ✅ PRE-DEADLINE CHECKLIST

### **Users:**
- [ ] All items entered in Forecast sheet
- [ ] All 12 categories covered (if applicable)
- [ ] Forecast IDs generated (Column A filled)
- [ ] Amounts double-checked

### **Admins:**
- [ ] Config updated (Period, Deadline)
- [ ] User list current (20 users)
- [ ] Triggers running (check Apps Script)
- [ ] User Status checked (who's pending?)

---

## 🚨 EMERGENCY CONTACTS

**Can't access sheet?** → IT Support  
**Script not working?** → Admin  
**Process questions?** → Manager  
**Technical errors?** → Check Apps Script logs

## 💡 PRO TIPS

**Users:**
- ✅ Submit early (don't wait for deadline)
- ✅ Copy last period's data for speed
- ✅ Keep Forecast IDs handy for PRs

**Admins:**
- ✅ Run Generate IDs daily
- ✅ Check triggers weekly
- ✅ Send manual reminders 2 days before
